# Resource Page Template

Use this structure for future Bedrock Index public resource pages.

## Who This Is For

Describe the audience for this resource.

## What This Helps You Do

Describe the task, decision, or readiness activity this resource supports.

## Plain-Language Summary

Provide a short, plain-language explanation.

## Readiness Checklist

| Item | Status / Notes |
|---|---|
| Readiness item | Notes |

## Required Documents or Information

| Document / Information | Why It May Be Needed |
|---|---|
| Document name | Purpose |

## Common Gaps

List common issues, missing information, or readiness gaps.

## Official Resources

Use explicit Markdown links to official sources.

- [Official Resource Name](https://example.com)

## Related Bedrock Index Pages

- Related page

## Review Record

| Field | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Owner** | Bedrock Index |
| **Last Reviewed** | YYYY-MM-DD |
| **Next Review Due** | YYYY-MM-DD |
| **Source Type** | Public educational resource |
